---
name: Terraform resource requirement
about: Deploy a new AWS resource via the Claude + Terraform pipeline
title: "feat: deploy [RESOURCE TYPE] for [PURPOSE]"
labels: ["needs-analysis"]
---

## What resource?
<!-- e.g. S3 bucket, RDS instance, Lambda, VPC, ECS cluster -->

## Why?
<!-- Brief business or technical justification -->

## Configuration
<!-- Be specific. Every setting that matters.
     Example for S3: versioning on, AES-256, no public access,
     lifecycle: abort incomplete MPU after 7 days -->

## Target environments
- [ ] dev
- [ ] prod
- [ ] both

## Security & compliance
<!-- Encryption, access controls, network restrictions -->

## Outputs needed
<!-- ARNs / endpoints / names to export to SSM -->

## Estimated usage
<!-- ~100 GB/month, ~10k requests/day — helps with cost estimation -->

## Tags
<!-- Team, service name — leave blank for pipeline defaults -->
